general_notes:
Configuration generated from conversational table design system.

Research Purpose: Create a table to track AI research papers on transformers, including citations, venues, and key findings

This configuration was automatically generated from a table structure created through
an interactive conversation. The validation targets and search groups are organized
based on the importance levels and data types specified during table design.

Identification columns are not included in validation targets as they represent
the core data being researched, not fields to be validated.

validation_targets.description: Primary authors (first author et al. format acceptable for large teams)
validation_targets.notes: Validation for authors: Primary authors (first author et al. format acceptable for large teams)

validation_targets.description: Publication venue (conference or journal name: NeurIPS, ICML, ACL, arXiv, etc.)
validation_targets.notes: Validation for venue: Publication venue (conference or journal name: NeurIPS, ICML, ACL, arXiv, etc.)

validation_targets.description: Quality tier of publication venue (A*, A, B, C based on CORE rankings or similar)
validation_targets.notes: Validation for venue_tier: Quality tier of publication venue (A*, A, B, C based on CORE rankings or similar)

validation_targets.description: Number of citations (from Google Scholar or Semantic Scholar)
validation_targets.notes: Validation for citation_count: Number of citations (from Google Scholar or Semantic Scholar)

validation_targets.description: Link to arXiv preprint or official paper URL
validation_targets.notes: Validation for arxiv_url: Link to arXiv preprint or official paper URL

validation_targets.description: Primary technical contribution or innovation introduced in the paper (1-2 sentences)
validation_targets.notes: Validation for key_innovation: Primary technical contribution or innovation introduced in the paper (1-2 sentences)

validation_targets.description: Main application domain or task (e.g., NLP, Computer Vision, Speech, Multimodal)
validation_targets.notes: Validation for primary_application: Main application domain or task (e.g., NLP, Computer Vision, Speech, Multimodal)

validation_targets.description: Whether official implementation code is publicly available (Yes/No/Partial)
validation_targets.notes: Validation for code_available: Whether official implementation code is publicly available (Yes/No/Partial)

validation_targets.description: Link to official GitHub or code repository if available
validation_targets.notes: Validation for code_repository_url: Link to official GitHub or code repository if available

validation_targets.description: Key datasets used for training or evaluation
validation_targets.notes: Validation for datasets_used: Key datasets used for training or evaluation

validation_targets.description: Number of parameters in the model (e.g., 110M, 175B)
validation_targets.notes: Validation for model_size_parameters: Number of parameters in the model (e.g., 110M, 175B)

validation_targets.description: Significant papers or models that built upon this work
validation_targets.notes: Validation for notable_follow_up_work: Significant papers or models that built upon this work
